brand_dna.category: Non-alcoholic functional spirits and ready-to-drink cocktails - a feel-good alcohol alternative for adults.
brand_dna.core_belief: You should be able to live the moment without compromising tomorrow - the buzz without the hangover.
proof_points: Smiling Wolf Proprietary Blend of natural nootropics + B vitamins (878mg per 250ml in the Mojito)
All ingredients GRAS (Generally Recognised as Safe) approved and certified
Distilled from original/authentic spirit ingredients; Aperitivo made from 18 mediterranean herbs and bitters
Low Sugar, Vegan Friendly, low Kcal (9 Kcal/25ml Spiced, 23-29 Kcal/25ml Aperitivo)
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, playful adult alternative that mimics real spirits and cocktails, differentiated by a mood-enhancing functional blend rather than plain zero-proof.

voice_pillars.name: Upbeat and Playful
voice_pillars.desc: Warm, cheeky, feel-good tone that leans into fun and personality over clinical wellness talk.
voice_pillars.quote: ALCOHOL ALTERNATIVE THAT MAKES YOU SMILE FROM THE FIRST SIP

voice_pillars.name: No-Compromise Promise
voice_pillars.desc: Frames every product around getting the good part of a drink and skipping the downside.
voice_pillars.quote: No booze. No crash. No hangover

voice_pillars.name: Sensory and Evocative
voice_pillars.desc: Sells the taste and mood with vivid, place-and-flavour language that makes the drink feel real.
voice_pillars.quote: Our alcohol free mojito is Cuba in a glass.

voice_pillars.name: Reassuringly Functional
voice_pillars.desc: Explains the science and safety plainly so buyers trust what is in the bottle.
voice_pillars.quote: designed to give you the buzz without the hangover

phrases: No booze. No crash. No hangover
live the moment without compromising tomorrow
sip away from lunch time until night time without consequences

icp: Sociable adults who want the ritual and taste of a proper drink but are cutting back on alcohol and refuse to sacrifice flavour, mood, or a clear head the next day.

personas.name: The Mindful Host
personas.description: Entertains at home and wants premium ready-to-drink cocktails and hosting packs so everyone feels included - moved by taste, presentation, and 'without consequences' messaging.

personas.name: The Sober-Curious Professional
personas.description: Cutting back but still wants a social buzz after work - moved by the nootropic mood-lift and 'no crash, no hangover' promise.

personas.name: The Flavour Seeker
personas.description: Loves classic cocktails like Aperitivo, Mojito and Dark & Stormy and buys for taste authenticity - moved by 'made from 18 mediterranean herbs' and 'Cuba in a glass' sensory copy.

offers: Free Next Day Shipping option on Aperitivo (2 Bottles tier)
Reliable Delivery guarantee: delivery within 3-5 business days or shipping is on us for in-control delays
Bundles and cocktail packs: Wolf Starter Pack, Crystal Starter Pack, Summer Hosting Pack, Mixed Cocktail Pack, plus themed spritz and G&T packs
14 calendar day returns on unused items in original packaging

allowed.claim: Non-alcoholic / 0.5% alcohol free spirits and cocktails.
Contains a proprietary blend of natural nootropics and B vitamins for a social buzz.
No booze, no crash, no hangover.
Low Sugar, Low Kcal, Vegan Friendly.
All ingredients are GRAS (Generally Recognised as Safe) approved and certified.
Aperitivo made from 18 different mediterranean herbs and bitters.

banned.claim: Any medical or therapeutic claim that the nootropics treat, cure or improve a health condition.
banned.why: Medical claims are banned for this category; keep to permitted lifestyle wording like 'mood enhancing'.

banned.claim: Unqualified 'sustainable', 'eco-friendly' or 'carbon neutral' packaging or product claims.
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claims without specific verifiable backing.

banned.claim: 'Zero impact' or '100% recycled' bottle/packaging claims without proof.
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - requires specific, verifiable substantiation not present on the site.

banned.claim: Stating or implying the drink is completely alcohol-free / 0.0%.
banned.why: Products are labelled 0.5%, so absolute '0.0%' or 'contains no alcohol' claims are unsubstantiated.

banned.claim: Claiming it is safe during pregnancy, breastfeeding or on medication.
banned.why: Site itself advises consulting a medical professional; a safety claim would contradict their own guidance and imply a medical assurance.

banned.claim: Implying it delivers or replaces an actual alcohol intoxication 'buzz'.
banned.why: Overstates effect beyond the mood-enhancing functional-blend positioning the brand actually backs.
